gaps.description: team=None or '' creates entries under a blank key — silent no-op, misleading queries
gaps.resolution: Guard in record_waiver() and record_incident(): raise ValueError if team is falsy.

gaps.description: Constructor does not specify a default storage path — callers must always supply one
gaps.resolution: Default path: gov/waiver_log.jsonl relative to repo root. Constructor accepts override. Extension .jsonl signals JSONL format.

gaps.description: Parameters after path are positional — junior engineers pass reason as team by mistake
gaps.resolution: Make all parameters keyword-only after the first argument in record_waiver() and record_incident().

gaps.description: No way to enumerate all teams or patterns with waivers — dashboard use case blocked
gaps.resolution: Add all_teams() and all_patterns() methods returning sorted sets from log scan.

gaps.description: Malformed JSONL lines (from rare concurrent write race) crash reader
gaps.resolution: Skip lines that fail json.loads() with a logged warning. Log remains usable.

gaps.description: Timestamp injection: caller can pass old timestamp to inflate accuracy
gaps.resolution: Warn (but do not reject) if timestamp is more than 7 days in the past. Document the limitation.

edge_cases.input: accuracy() called when waiver count < MIN_SAMPLE (5)
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Returns None. Caller must handle None explicitly.

edge_cases.input: Waiver and incident have identical timestamps
edge_cases.expected_behavior: waivers_before_incident includes the waiver (boundary is inclusive). accuracy() counts it as inaccurate.
all_teams() and all_patterns() return empty sets. accuracy() returns None.
Line skipped with warning. All other entries loaded normally.

failure_modes.name: TEAM_EMPTY
failure_modes.message_template: team must be a non-empty string, got: {team!r}

failure_modes.name: LOG_UNWRITABLE
failure_modes.trigger: waiver_log.jsonl path is not writable (permissions, missing parent dir)
failure_modes.message_template: Cannot write to waiver log: {path}. Check that the parent directory exists and is writable.

integration_points.contract: Future integration: after parsing pattern_checks, call tracker.record_waiver() for each addressed=false entry. Out of scope for this turn.
Future integration: Governor reads accuracy scores as gaming signal. Out of scope for this turn.

pattern_checks.waiver_reason: WaiverTracker is a log and query library. It does not perform retries or mutate state on failure. The code shape is a plain append operation — no retry logic present.
pattern_checks.code_shape_that_triggered: append-only log file with JSON entries
